testcase.name: US-821 + US-820: Header and KPI Styling Evidence
testcase.system-out:
Current URL: http://localhost:9090/dashboard/shipper Page has dashboard-grid: false Page has shipper-page-header: false ✅ Header Styling Computed: Background: rgb(255, 255, 255) Border: 1px rgb(208, 208, 208) Border Radius: 8px Padding: 24px Box Shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 4px 0px ✅ Header screenshot captured: us-821-header-bounded.png ✅ Found 9 KPI tiles Tile 1 Shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 4px 0px Tile 2 Shadow: none Tile 3 Shadow: none Tile 4 Shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 4px 0px Tile 5 Shadow: none Tile 6 Shadow: none Tile 7 Shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) 0px 2px 4px 0px Tile 8 Shadow: none Tile 9 Shadow: none ✅ KPI panel screenshot captured: us-820-kpi-panel.png ✅ Full dashboard screenshot captured: us-821-us-820-full-dashboard.png
✅ ALL STYLING VERIFICATION COMPLETE Evidence files: - us-821-header-bounded.png - us-820-kpi-panel.png - us-821-us-820-full-dashboard.png
